content.fact_text: Implementation of SkuPartitionManager to handle distributed SKU range partitioning and locking.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides distributed locking, SKU range tracking, and partition synchronization for the inventory reconciliation service. Uses Redis for distributed locking and registry maintenance, with Opossum for circuit breaking.
provenance_data.utility: Handles partition lifecycle for distributed inventory reconciliation, ensuring only one instance processes a SKU range at a time via Redis-based locking and registry tracking.
